acceptanceSignals: RBAC tests cover allow/deny for employee, vendor operator, committee admin, and payroll operator.
Authenticated context always carries actorId, role, and scoped plant info.
HTTP and MCP paths use the same authorization policy engine.

attempts.latestEventSummary: feature completed: Identity and Access Governance in 0 attempts

lastCommit.message: feat: implement Identity and Access Governance (attempt 1)

excludedApproaches: Using a single unified corporate IdP for all roles.
Using local accounts for all roles.
Maintaining separate auth logic stacks for HTTP and MCP.
executionConstraints: Use employee/committee corporate SSO plus vendor account with MFA as the only identity model.
All write operations require authenticated actor context and auditable identity linkage.
Authorization policy must be centralized and reused across transport layers.
name: Identity and Access Governance
rationale: Every business flow depends on correct identity boundaries and role enforcement.
summary: Establish unified authentication, authorization, and actor-context foundations.
